title: Multiplayer Server Pause
description: Pauses servers when all connected clients are paused.
body:
Simple utility mod that allows servers (including integrated servers) to pause when all connected clients are paused/on a pauseable screen.

You can also configure it to pause servers when there are no clients connected (to save your CPU!) and to send a chat message when the server pauses. 

Also adds a `/pause` command for Ops to force a pause on the server regardless of the pause state of clients.

Required on both client and server.
